title: DECISION-EXTRACT output — decision points DP* with blast-radius proposals

lock_verified.description: Lock present + status==frozen + named artifact exists on disk

class.description: Project class read from aPRD body (greenfield | feature-add)

decision_points.description: All extracted DP* entries; emission order = checklist order, ties by lowest forced_by id position

id.description: Stable DP* id; contiguous from DP1 in emission order

decision.description: Open question/fork that must be chosen; never answered; no vendor/stack pinned

category.description: Exactly one taxonomy label (Architectural style | Tech stack | Persistence | Sync vs async | Boundary strategy | API style | Cross-cutting | Deployment topology | Build/test strategy | Conformance)

forced_by.description: Non-empty array of frozen-aPRD ids that force this fork; removing any id weakens fork

candidate_blast_radius.description: DECISION-EXTRACT's proposal; TRIAGE owns binding call

fork_evidence.description: One line: ≥2 real compliant resolutions exist — genuineness proof for discriminator clause

cut_ref.description: Cut element traced to (FD* | seam:<name> | deferred:<slice>), or null when cut did not name it

checklist_coverage.description: Every taxonomy category appears exactly once — full accounting of all categories

fired.description: True if at least one DP was extracted for this category

decision_points.description: DP ids assigned to this category; empty array when fired=false

note.description: Why fired or why closed; cites forcing aPRD ids

aprd_defects.description: Forces that cannot be framed (contradictory/underspecified); empty on clean run

reason.description: Why no decision point can be framed from this force

decision_point_counts.description: Tally of extracted decision points by blast-radius; walk to count, do not estimate

local.description: Count of local candidate_blast_radius DPs; foundational + local == total
